name: ChefFlow MemPalace Search
description: Search the live ChefFlow MemPalace corpus in palace2 when the answer may live in prior sessions, mined docs, or semantic memory not obvious from the current workspace documents.
author: @codex

input.hint: Path to the active MemPalace corpus. Leave pointed at palace2.
Python launcher to run the bundled MemPalace query script.

examples.prompt: Find what ChefFlow knows about invoice numbering race conditions.
Search prior ChefFlow sessions about MemPalace and AnythingLLM.
Look in the codex conversation wing for prior work on ChefFlow SEO deploy issues.

query.description: Search query to run against MemPalace.

wing.description: Optional MemPalace wing filter like cfv1, chefflow-conversations, or codex-conversations.

room.description: Optional MemPalace room filter like lib, docs, app, or conversation-summaries.
